description_long: This shotgun features a streamlined, modern design with a predominantly light gray body accented by wood-textured grip and fore-end panels. The stock is a compact, synthetic type with a flat, angled buttplate and a black insert, providing ergonomic support. The receiver is smooth and minimalistic, with a small ejection port and a visible safety or selector switch above the trigger. The barrel is cylindrical and unadorned, with a short muzzle and no visible ribbing or venting. The trigger guard is large and rounded, with a black finish and a slight forward extension for finger protection. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials, with a focus on durability and ease of handling.
description: A modern, light gray shotgun with wood-textured grips, a compact synthetic stock, and a smooth cylindrical barrel. The design is sleek and functional, with a large rounded trigger guard and minimal external features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening and the symmetrical, streamlined body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the wood-textured grip, compact stock, and the smooth, uninterrupted barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, angled buttplate of the stock and the top of the receiver.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the trigger guard, grip, and stock details.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, smooth cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded, black trigger guard with a slight forward extension and smooth edges
